title: Dekton 50MM Covered Steel Padlock | Heavy-Duty with Reusable Storage Case | Includes 3 Keys | Ideal for Truckers, Farmers & Contractors | Clevis Grab Hooks | 4000lb Working Load Limit | Grade 43
features: Heavy-Duty Covered Steel Construction: Built for durability, the Dekton 50MM Covered Steel Padlock is designed to withstand harsh conditions, making it ideal for heavy-duty use by truckers, farmers, and contractors. Its robust construction ensures reliable security.

Reusable Storage Case Included: The padlock comes with a convenient reusable storage case, perfect for keeping the padlock safe when not in use. This case also offers easy transportation and organization, adding extra value.

Includes 3 Steel Keys: The padlock set comes with three sturdy steel keys, providing convenient access and the ability to share or keep spares for backup. Never worry about losing a key with this multi-key system.

4000lb Working Load Limit: Rated with a 4000lb working load limit, this padlock ensures strong performance for securing gates, trucks, equipment, and more. Its high-grade steel construction is designed to handle heavy loads.

Grade 43 Strength with Clevis Grab Hooks: Featuring Grade 43 strength and clevis grab hooks at either end, this padlock is engineered for heavy-duty tasks and provides superior security for a wide range of uses in commercial, farming, and industrial settings.
description: From the manufacturer 50MM PROTECTED STEEL PADLOCK Protected steel body. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. Suitable for securing residential/commercial property, luggage & lockers. Hardened Steel shackle. Includes 3 keys. ADVANCED LEVEL OF SECURITY HARDENED STEEL SHACKLE Excellent anti-cut resistance. Heat treated to be harder, safer and cut resistant. PROTECTED STEEL BODY Protected steel body. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. AVAILABLE IN STANDARD AND LONG SHACKLE Available in both standard shackle and long shackle. Standard sizes include: 25mm, 30mm, 40mm and 50mm. Long shackle size: 40mm. IDEAL FOR SECURING Residential / Commercial property. Factories / Garages. Sheds / Fences. Doors/ Gates. Motorbikes / Bicycles. Tools / Gardening equipment / Ladders.
